primaryToAccent.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 20%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent))

accentToPrimary.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 20%, transparent))

secondaryToAccent.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 30%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent))

accentToSecondary.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 20%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 30%, transparent))

primaryToSecondary.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 20%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 30%, transparent))

secondaryToPrimary.value: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary) 30%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 20%, transparent))
